title: ProcScript expressions
text: ProcScript expressions View valid ProcScript expression values. For the debugger, a valid ProcScript expression is any expression that the ProcScript function $expression can handle. That is, any valid combination of: ProcScript operators, including string substitution ProcScript functions Variables, if valid in context Literal constants Entity fields, including indirection Related Links $expression Return the result of evaluating a nonconditional expression.
